sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82072" key="perisarki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισαρκ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n82072.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make an incision all round</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:46:22:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.22.12</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:3:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:5:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
